subheadline: From a handful of Fluid templates to 244 content elements with their own theme engine.

events.title: First public release
events.description: Desiderio 1.0 brought shadcn-inspired styling to TYPO3 Content Blocks, with backend previews from day one.

events.title: 49 Fluid 5 components
events.description: The component layer landed: 17 atoms, 28 molecules, and 4 layout primitives shared across every element.

events.title: 15 theme presets
events.description: Ten house presets from Aurora to Citrus joined the five shadcn styles — switching repaints the site at runtime.

events.title: Per-page presets in 2.6
events.description: Any page subtree can now run its own theme, inherited down the rootline. The styleguide shows one per chapter.
